symptoms.description: List of symptoms mentioned in the clinical text

duration.description: Duration per symptom, use 'unspecified' if not mentioned

severity.description: Severity per symptom, use 'unspecified' if not mentioned

urgent.description: True if any symptom suggests clinical urgency

metadata.description: Optional provenance information for reproducibility and paper documentation

generated_by.description: Model used to generate this label, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-6', 'gpt-4o'

split.description: Dataset split this example belongs to
